questions.question: Which of the compounds when brominated turns to meso $2, 3\text{ di bromobutane}$ ?
From following reactions, which reaction does not give "Benzene"?
What is the major product in the following reaction? [Diagram] $	ext{CH}_3 - 	ext{C}(	ext{H}) - 	ext{CH} = 	ext{CH}_2 ightarrow 	ext{HX} ightarrow ?$

options.A: $	ext{CH}_2 - 	ext{C}(	ext{H})(	ext{CH}_3) - 	ext{CH}_2 - 	ext{CH}_3$ (with X on first C)
options.B: $	ext{CH}_3 - 	ext{C}(	ext{CH}_3)(	ext{X}) - 	ext{CH}_2 - 	ext{CH}_3$
options.C: $	ext{CH}_3 - 	ext{C}(	ext{H})(	ext{CH}_3) - 	ext{CH}_2 - 	ext{CH}_2	ext{X}$
options.D: $	ext{CH}_3 - 	ext{C}(	ext{CH}_3)(	ext{H}) - 	ext{CH}(	ext{X}) - 	ext{CH}_3$
